title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
